items.definition_en: A blender is an electric appliance used to mix or puree food and drinks.
items.example_en: I use the blender to make smoothies every morning.

items.definition_en: A colander is a bowl-shaped utensil with holes for draining liquids from food.
items.example_en: She poured the cooked pasta into the colander to drain the water.

items.definition_en: Cutlery refers to knives, forks, and spoons used for eating and serving food.
items.example_en: The cutlery is in the top kitchen drawer.

items.definition_en: A dishwasher is a machine used to wash dishes and utensils automatically.
items.example_en: We loaded the dirty plates into the dishwasher after dinner.

items.definition_en: A grater is a tool for shredding cheese or vegetables into small pieces.
items.example_en: He used the grater to shred some cheese for the pasta.

items.definition_en: A measuring jug is a container marked with units for measuring liquids or ingredients.
items.example_en: I poured milk into the measuring jug to get the right amount.

items.definition_en: A utensil is a tool used in the kitchen for preparing or serving food.
items.example_en: She took out a utensil to stir the sauce.

items.definition_en: A baking tray is a flat metal sheet used for cooking food in the oven.
items.example_en: Place the cookies on the baking tray before putting them in the oven.

items.definition_en: A drainboard is a sloped surface next to a sink for draining washed dishes.
items.example_en: Clean plates were set on the drainboard to dry.

items.definition_en: A range hood is a device above a stove that removes smoke and odors from the kitchen.
items.example_en: The range hood keeps the kitchen air fresh while cooking.

items.definition_en: A pepper mill is a device for grinding whole peppercorns into fine pepper.
items.example_en: He used the pepper mill to add fresh pepper to his salad.

items.definition_en: A tap is a device that controls the flow of water from a pipe.
items.example_en: She turned on the tap to fill the kettle with water.

items.definition_en: A tea towel is a cloth for drying dishes and wiping surfaces in the kitchen.
items.example_en: I grabbed a tea towel to dry my hands.

items.definition_en: A toaster is a small appliance used to toast bread by exposing it to heat.
items.example_en: He put two slices of bread in the toaster.

items.definition_en: A worktop is a flat surface in a kitchen where food is prepared.
items.example_en: There are vegetables and knives on the worktop.

items.definition_en: A whisk is a kitchen tool used for mixing and beating ingredients by hand.
items.example_en: She used a whisk to mix the eggs for the omelette.
